indicators.name: FINRA margin debt / GDP

indicators.name: Google Trends 'stock market'
indicators.error: pytrends fetch failed: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='trends.google.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /trends/api/widgetdata/multiline?req=%7B%22time%22%3A+%222025-07-06+2026-07-06%22%2C+%22resolution%22%3A+%22WEEK%22%2C+%22locale%22%3A+%22en-US%22%2C+%22comparisonItem%22%3A+%5B%7B%22geo%22%3A+%7B%22country%22%3A+%22US%22%7D%2C+%22complexKeywordsRestriction%22%3A+%7B%22keyword%22%3A+%5B%7B%22type%22%3A+%22BROAD%22%2C+%22value%22%3A+%22stock+market%22%7D%5D%7D%7D%5D%2C+%22requestOptions%22%3A+%7B%22property%22%3A+%22%22%2C+%22backend%22%3A+%22IZG%22%2C+%22category%22%3A+0%7D%2C+%22userConfig%22%3A+%7B%22userType%22%3A+%22USER_TYPE_SCRAPER%22%7D%7D&token=ABQmPm8AAAAAak0tVLcrS-xxu4Wc3T6vCO53Ouf0WvrC&tz=360 (Caused by ResponseError('too many 429 error responses'))

methodology: Each structural indicator (Shiller PE, Buffett, margin debt, AAII cash) is converted to a 0-100 sub-score via a rolling z-score (z=-2 -> 0, z=+2 -> 100). AAII cash is inverted: high cash = fear = low score. CNN F&G is used directly (already 0-100). Google Trends 'stock market' acts as an X-factor override: when its score reaches 80 the composite is floored at that level.
